query: Use $plan-delivery to turn this frozen workflow-kit story DAG and ready contracts into an execution package.
The epic is story-dag: frozen and all stories are story: ready; create plan.md, tracker.md, and prompts for orchestrated-delivery.
Review the existing plan-delivery execution package for this ready epic and fix missing source story and AC traces.
Package the ready stories with provider profiles, model classes, effort, tiers, and routing rationale but no runtime model names.
Use $plan-epic to write the story DAG and story contracts for this ready epic charter.
Use $orchestrated-delivery to dispatch implementers, review their diffs, commit approved stories, and open the PR.
Implement story fnd-02 now, run tests, and commit the approved pathset.
Inspect unresolved GitHub review threads on the delivery PR and fix the requested changes.
Draft the domain and epic charters that decide the scope and acceptance criteria for a new workflow-kit epic.
Pick the runtime-bound provider identifiers to use for tonight's orchestrated delivery run based on current availability.
